---
title: "Dashboard Santé et Territoires"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: lumen
runtime: shiny
---

```{r global, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# 1. Chargement des packages
required_packages <- c(
  "flexdashboard", "shiny", "tidyverse", "tidytext", "wordcloud2", "leaflet",
  "sf", "DT", "plotly", "stopwords", "scales", "htmltools", "stringi"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(paste0("Packages manquants: ", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "), ". Installe-les avec install.packages()."))
}

invisible(lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

# 2. Fonctions de lecture
read_finess <- function(path) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = path, delim = ";", col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
    trim_ws = TRUE, locale = readr::locale(encoding = "Latin1"), show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE
  )
}

read_etalab_mapping <- function(path) {
  readr::read_delim(
    file = path, delim = ";", col_names = c("type_lien", "finess", "etalab", "meta"),
    col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()), trim_ws = TRUE,
    locale = readr::locale(encoding = "Latin1"), show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE
  )
}

normalize_token <- function(x) {
  x |> stringi::stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") |> stringr::str_to_lower()
}

# 3. Importation des données
etab_raw <- read_finess("Data/finess_etablissements.csv") |>
  transmute(
    nofinesset, rs, rslongue,
    departement = coalesce(na_if(departement, ""), "NC"),
    libdepartement = coalesce(na_if(libdepartement, ""), "Non renseigne"),
    coordxet = readr::parse_double(coordxet, locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = ".")),
    coordyet = readr::parse_double(coordyet, locale = readr::locale(decimal_mark = "."))
  )

activites <- read_finess("Data/finess_activites_soin.csv") |> transmute(nofinesset, libactivite)
disciplines <- read_finess("Data/finess_disciplines_enseignement.csv") |> transmute(nofinesset, libde)
materiels <- read_finess("Data/finess_materiels_lourds.csv") |> transmute(nofinesset, libeml)

etalab_raw <- read_etalab_mapping("Data/etalab-cs1100505-stock-20260311-0344.csv")
etalab_map <- etalab_raw |> filter(type_lien == "structureet") |> transmute(nofinesset = finess, etalab)

etab <- etab_raw |> filter(!is.na(rs), rs != "")

etab_for_analysis <- etab |>
  mutate(rs_norm_clean = str_squish(str_replace_all(normalize_token(rs), "[^[:alnum:] ]", " ")))

etab_meta <- etab |> select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement)

# 4. Stop words enrichis
stop_fr <- tibble(token_norm = normalize_token(stopwords::stopwords("fr", source = "snowball")))
stop_custom <- tibble(
  token_norm = c(
    "centre", "centres", "etablissement", "etablissements", "site", "hopital",
    "hospitalier", "hospitaliere", "hospitalieres", "hospitaliers", "clinique",
    "groupement", "pole", "poles", "service", "services", "unite", "unites",
    "maison", "sante", "institut", "association", "residence", "foyer", "de",
    "du", "des", "d", "l", "le", "la", "les", "aux", "sur", "chez", "en",
    "medical", "medicale", "medico", "soins", "soin", "prive", "privee", 
    "public", "publique", "ch", "chu", "chr", "chru", "cs"
  )
)
stop_all <- bind_rows(stop_fr, stop_custom) |> distinct()

etab_text <- etab |>
  mutate(text_clean = str_replace_all(str_replace_all(rs, "['’]", " "), "[^[:alnum:] ]", " "))

tokens <- etab_text |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, text_clean) |>
  unnest_tokens(output = token, input = text_clean, token = "words") |>
  mutate(token_norm = normalize_token(token)) |>
  filter(str_detect(token_norm, "[a-z]"), str_length(token_norm) > 2) |>
  anti_join(stop_all, by = "token_norm")

bigrams <- etab_text |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, text_clean) |>
  unnest_tokens(output = bigram, input = text_clean, token = "ngrams", n = 2) |>
  separate(bigram, into = c("w1", "w2"), sep = " ", remove = FALSE) |>
  mutate(w1 = normalize_token(w1), w2 = normalize_token(w2), bigram = paste(w1, w2)) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(w1), !is.na(w2), str_detect(w1, "[a-z]"), str_detect(w2, "[a-z]"),
    str_length(w1) > 2, str_length(w2) > 2
  ) |>
  anti_join(stop_all |> rename(w1 = token_norm), by = "w1") |>
  anti_join(stop_all |> rename(w2 = token_norm), by = "w2")

dep_tfidf <- tokens |>
  count(departement, token_norm, name = "n") |>
  bind_tf_idf(token_norm, departement, n) |>
  arrange(desc(tf_idf))

# 5. Analyses croisées (Equipements, Innovation, Sémantique)
equipment_counts <- materiels |>
  mutate(libeml_norm = normalize_token(coalesce(libeml, ""))) |>
  filter(libeml_norm != "") |> count(nofinesset, name = "n_eml_etab")

target_terms <- tibble::tribble(
  ~term, ~pattern,
  "Polyvalent", "\\bpolyvalent\\b",
  "Clinique", "\\bclinique\\b",
  "Centre de sante", "\\bcentre\\s+de\\s+sante\\b",
  "Radiologie", "\\bradiologie\\b"
)

term_equipment_long <- etab_for_analysis |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, rs_norm_clean) |>
  left_join(equipment_counts, by = "nofinesset") |>
  mutate(n_eml_etab = replace_na(n_eml_etab, 0L)) |>
  tidyr::crossing(target_terms) |>
  mutate(term_present = str_detect(rs_norm_clean, pattern)) |> select(-pattern)

innovation_pattern <- "\\b(telemedecine|numerique|innovation|expertise|digital|esante|connecte|connectee)\\b"

dep_innovation <- etab_for_analysis |>
  select(nofinesset, departement, libdepartement, rs_norm_clean) |>
  left_join(etalab_map |> distinct(nofinesset, etalab), by = "nofinesset") |>
  mutate(
    has_etalab_link = !is.na(etalab) & etalab != "",
    has_innovation_name = str_detect(rs_norm_clean, innovation_pattern),
    innovation_hub = has_etalab_link & has_innovation_name
  ) |>
  group_by(departement) |>
  summarise(
    n_etab_innov = n(),
    n_nom_innov = sum(has_innovation_name, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_etalab = sum(has_etalab_link, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_hubs = sum(innovation_hub, na.rm = TRUE),
    hubs_per_100 = if_else(n_etab_innov > 0, 100 * n_hubs / n_etab_innov, 0),
    part_nom_innov = if_else(n_etab_innov > 0, 100 * n_nom_innov / n_etab_innov, 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dep_semantic <- tokens |>
  count(departement, token_norm, name = "n") |>
  group_by(departement) |>
  summarise(
    score_diversite_sem = -sum((n / sum(n)) * log(n / sum(n))),
    n_mots_cles_uniques = n_distinct(token_norm),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

etab_token_profile <- tokens |> group_by(nofinesset, departement) |> summarise(n_tokens = n(), n_tokens_uniques = n_distinct(token_norm), .groups = "drop")

dep_diversity_scatter <- etab_meta |>
  count(departement, name = "n_etab_total") |>
  left_join(etab_token_profile |> group_by(departement) |> summarise(mots_uniques_par_etab = mean(n_tokens_uniques), .groups = "drop"), by = "departement") |>
  left_join(dep_semantic, by = "departement") |>
  mutate(across(c(mots_uniques_par_etab, score_diversite_sem, n_mots_cles_uniques), ~replace_na(.x, 0)))

top_themes_dep <- tokens |>
  count(departement, token_norm, sort = TRUE, name = "n") |> group_by(departement) |>
  slice_max(order_by = n, n = 8, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  summarise(top_themes = paste0(token_norm, " (", n, ")", collapse = ", "), .groups = "drop")

# 6. Statistiques géographiques globales
dep_stats <- etab_meta |>
  count(departement, name = "n_etab") |>
  left_join(activites |> left_join(etab_meta, by = "nofinesset") |> filter(!is.na(departement)) |> count(departement, name = "n_act"), by = "departement") |>
  left_join(disciplines |> left_join(etab_meta, by = "nofinesset") |> filter(!is.na(departement)) |> count(departement, name = "n_de"), by = "departement") |>
  left_join(materiels |> left_join(etab_meta, by = "nofinesset") |> filter(!is.na(departement)) |> count(departement, name = "n_eml"), by = "departement") |>
  left_join(top_themes_dep, by = "departement") |>
  mutate(
    across(c(n_act, n_de, n_eml), ~replace_na(.x, 0L)),
    n_act_per_100 = if_else(n_etab > 0, 100 * n_act / n_etab, 0),
    n_de_per_100 = if_else(n_etab > 0, 100 * n_de / n_etab, 0),
    n_eml_per_100 = if_else(n_etab > 0, 100 * n_eml / n_etab, 0),
    score_acces = scales::rescale(0.5 * n_act_per_100 + 0.3 * n_de_per_100 + 0.2 * n_eml_per_100, to = c(0, 100)),
    top_themes = replace_na(top_themes, "Pas de thèmes détectés")
  )

dep_geo <- sf::st_read("Data/departements.geojson", quiet = TRUE) |>
  mutate(departement = stringr::str_to_upper(as.character(code)), libdepartement_geo = as.character(nom)) |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  left_join(dep_stats, by = "departement") |> left_join(dep_innovation, by = "departement") |> left_join(dep_semantic, by = "departement") |>
  mutate(
    across(c(n_etab, n_act, n_de, n_eml, n_etab_innov, n_nom_innov, n_etalab, n_hubs, n_mots_cles_uniques), ~replace_na(.x, 0L)),
    across(c(n_act_per_100, n_de_per_100, n_eml_per_100, score_acces, hubs_per_100, part_nom_innov, score_diversite_sem), ~replace_na(.x, 0)),
    libdepartement = coalesce(libdepartement_geo, departement)
  )

dep_diversity_scatter <- dep_diversity_scatter |>
  left_join(dep_geo |> st_drop_geometry() |> select(departement, libdepartement) |> distinct(), by = "departement") |>
  mutate(
    seuil_bas_etab = quantile(n_etab_total[n_etab_total > 0], probs = 0.35, na.rm = TRUE),
    seuil_haut_div = quantile(mots_uniques_par_etab, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    profil = if_else(n_etab_total <= seuil_bas_etab & mots_uniques_par_etab >= seuil_haut_div, "Peu d'établissements / forte diversité", "Profil standard")
  )

# UI Choix
map_metric_choices <- c(
  "Établissements (volume)" = "n_etab", "Activités de soin pour 100 établissements" = "n_act_per_100",
  "Disciplines pour 100 établissements" = "n_de_per_100", "Matériels lourds pour 100 établissements" = "n_eml_per_100",
  "Indice composite d'accès (0-100)" = "score_acces", "Pôles innovation pour 100 établissements" = "hubs_per_100",
  "Score de diversité sémantique" = "score_diversite_sem"
)

dep_choices_tbl <- dep_geo |> st_drop_geometry() |> filter(n_etab > 0) |> distinct(departement, libdepartement) |> arrange(departement) |> mutate(label = paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement))
dep_choices <- c("Tous" = "Tous", setNames(dep_choices_tbl$departement, dep_choices_tbl$label))

# Palette globale
couleur_principale <- "#2A9D8F"
couleur_secondaire <- "#E9C46A"
couleur_accent <- "#E76F51"
```

```{css}
.sidebar { overflow-y: auto; }
.section.sidebar h3 { margin-top: 0.4em; }
.leaflet-container { min-height: 460px; }
.plotly html-widget, .html-widget { width: 100% !important; }
```

# Exploration NLP

Column {.sidebar data-width=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Filtres

```{r}
selectInput("dep_select_explo", "Sélection du département", choices = dep_choices, selected = "Tous", selectize = TRUE)
sliderInput("top_n", "Nombre de termes affichés", min = 10, max = 80, value = 30, step = 5)
```

### Lecture de l'axe
```{r}
HTML("<b>Axe d'étude :</b> spécialisation des territoires via la sémantique des noms d'établissements.<br><b>Principe :</b> on nettoie les noms (tokenisation + stop words), puis on compare les thèmes dominants par département.")
```

### Indicateurs

```{r}
# --- CREATION DES BLOCS REACTIFS POUR OPTIMISER LES CALCULS ---
react_explo_meta <- reactive({
  req(input$dep_select_explo)
  if(input$dep_select_explo == "Tous") etab_meta else filter(etab_meta, departement == input$dep_select_explo)
})

react_explo_tokens <- reactive({
  req(input$dep_select_explo)
  if(input$dep_select_explo == "Tous") tokens else filter(tokens, departement == input$dep_select_explo)
})

react_explo_bigrams <- reactive({
  req(input$dep_select_explo)
  if(input$dep_select_explo == "Tous") bigrams else filter(bigrams, departement == input$dep_select_explo)
})
# -------------------------------------------------------------

renderValueBox({
  valueBox(value = format(nrow(react_explo_meta()), big.mark = " "), caption = "Établissements", icon = "fa-hospital", color = "primary")
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  ids <- react_explo_meta()$nofinesset
  valueBox(value = format(activites |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow(), big.mark = " "), caption = "Lignes d'activités de soin", icon = "fa-stethoscope", color = "success")
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  ids <- react_explo_meta()$nofinesset
  n_de <- disciplines |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow()
  n_eml <- materiels |> filter(nofinesset %in% ids) |> nrow()
  valueBox(value = paste0(format(n_de, big.mark = " "), " / ", format(n_eml, big.mark = " ")), caption = "Disciplines / Matériels", icon = "fa-cogs", color = "warning")
})
```

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Nuage de mots

```{r}
renderWordcloud2({
  wc <- react_explo_tokens() |> count(token_norm, sort = TRUE) |> slice_head(n = input$top_n) |> rename(word = token_norm, freq = n)
  validate(need(nrow(wc) > 0, "Aucun terme disponible pour ce filtre."))
  wordcloud2(data = wc, size = 0.7, minSize = 6, rotateRatio = 0.2, color = "random-dark", backgroundColor = "#f7f9fb")
})
```

### Bigrammes

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- react_explo_bigrams() |> count(bigram, sort = TRUE) |> slice_head(n = input$top_n) |> mutate(bigram = forcats::fct_reorder(bigram, n))
  validate(need(nrow(df) > 0, "Aucun bigramme disponible pour ce filtre."))
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = bigram, y = n)) + geom_col(fill = couleur_principale) + coord_flip() + labs(x = NULL, y = "Occurrences") + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("x", "y"))
})
```

### Spécificités (TF-IDF)

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  validate(need(input$dep_select_explo != "Tous", "Sélectionnez un département spécifique pour visualiser ses termes uniques (TF-IDF)."))
  df <- dep_tfidf |> filter(departement == input$dep_select_explo) |> slice_max(order_by = tf_idf, n = input$top_n, with_ties = FALSE) |> mutate(token_norm = forcats::fct_reorder(token_norm, tf_idf))
  validate(need(nrow(df) > 0, "Aucun terme TF-IDF disponible pour ce département."))
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = token_norm, y = tf_idf)) + geom_col(fill = couleur_accent) + coord_flip() + labs(x = NULL, y = "Score TF-IDF") + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("x", "y"))
})
```

### Table des termes
```{r}
renderDT({
  react_explo_tokens() |> count(token_norm, sort = TRUE, name = "frequence") |> slice_head(n = input$top_n) |> datatable(rownames = FALSE, options = list(pageLength = 12, dom = "tip"))
})
```

# Cartographie

Column {.sidebar data-width=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Filtres cartographiques

```{r}
selectInput("dep_select_carto", "Sélection du département", choices = dep_choices, selected = "Tous", selectize = TRUE)
selectInput("map_metric_carto", "Indicateur cartographique", choices = map_metric_choices, selected = "n_etab", selectize = FALSE)
HTML("<b>Lecture :</b> changer d'indicateur pour comparer le volume brut et l'intensité d'offre.<br>Le filtre département permet de focaliser les analyses détaillées.")

react_carto_geo <- reactive({
  req(input$dep_select_carto)
  if(input$dep_select_carto == "Tous") dep_geo else filter(dep_geo, departement == input$dep_select_carto)
})
```

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Carte départementale

```{r}
renderLeaflet({
  d <- react_carto_geo()
  validate(need(nrow(d) > 0, "Aucune géométrie disponible."))
  metric_id <- input$map_metric_carto
  metric_label <- names(map_metric_choices)[match(metric_id, map_metric_choices)]
  
  d <- d |> mutate(metric_value = .data[[metric_id]])
  pal <- colorNumeric(palette = "YlGnBu", domain = dep_geo[[metric_id]], na.color = "#f0f0f0")

  leaflet(d) |> addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
    addPolygons(
      fillColor = ~pal(metric_value), weight = 1, color = "#4f5d75", opacity = 1, fillOpacity = 0.75,
      label = ~paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement, " | ", metric_label, " : ", scales::number(metric_value, accuracy = 0.1)),
      popup = ~paste0("<b>", departement, " - ", libdepartement, "</b><br>Etablissements: ", format(n_etab, big.mark=" "), "<br>Indice composite: ", scales::number(score_acces, accuracy=0.1), "<br><b>Thèmes dominants:</b><br>", htmltools::htmlEscape(top_themes))
    ) |> addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = dep_geo[[metric_id]], title = metric_label, opacity = 0.85)
})
```

### Profil territorial

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- dep_geo |> st_drop_geometry() |> filter(n_etab > 0)
  df <- if (input$dep_select_carto == "Tous") mutate(df, selection = "Autres") else mutate(df, selection = if_else(departement == input$dep_select_carto, "Sélection", "Autres"))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = n_etab, y = n_act_per_100, size = n_eml_per_100, color = selection, text = paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement, "<br>Etablissements: ", n_etab, "<br>Activités/100: ", round(n_act_per_100, 1)))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) + scale_color_manual(values = c("Autres" = "#6c757d", "Sélection" = couleur_principale)) +
    labs(x = "Nombre d'établissements", y = "Activités de soin pour 100 établissements", size = "Matériels lourds / 100") + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
})
```

### Classement

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  metric_id <- input$map_metric_carto
  metric_label <- names(map_metric_choices)[match(metric_id, map_metric_choices)]
  df <- dep_geo |> st_drop_geometry() |> filter(n_etab > 0) |> transmute(departement = paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement), metric_value = .data[[metric_id]]) |> arrange(desc(metric_value))
  df <- if (input$dep_select_carto == "Tous") slice_head(df, n = 20) else mutate(df, selection = if_else(str_detect(departement, paste0("^", input$dep_select_carto, " - ")), "Sélection", "Autres"))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = forcats::fct_reorder(departement, metric_value), y = metric_value)) + geom_col(fill = couleur_principale) + coord_flip() + labs(x = NULL, y = metric_label) + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("x", "y"))
})
```

# Analyses avancées

Column {.sidebar data-width=320}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Filtres des axes avancés

```{r}
selectInput("dep_select_axes", "Sélection du département", choices = dep_choices, selected = "Tous", selectize = TRUE)
HTML("<b>Objectif :</b> relier sémantique, équipement, maturité numérique et diversité territoriale.<br>Le filtre département applique une lecture locale des trois axes.")

react_axes_term <- reactive({
  req(input$dep_select_axes)
  if(input$dep_select_axes == "Tous") term_equipment_long else filter(term_equipment_long, departement == input$dep_select_axes)
})
```

Column {.tabset}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Matériels vs Noms

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- react_axes_term() |> group_by(term, term_present) |> summarise(equipements_moyens = mean(n_eml_etab), .groups = "drop") |> mutate(presence = if_else(term_present, "Terme présent", "Terme absent"))
  validate(need(nrow(df) > 0, "Aucune donnée pour cette sélection."))
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = term, y = equipements_moyens, fill = presence)) + geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) + scale_fill_manual(values = c("Terme absent" = "#D3D3D3", "Terme présent" = couleur_principale)) + labs(x = NULL, y = "Matériels lourds moyens", fill = NULL) + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("x", "y", "fill"))
})
```

### Maturité numérique (Carte)

```{r}
renderLeaflet({
  d <- if(input$dep_select_axes == "Tous") dep_geo else filter(dep_geo, departement == input$dep_select_axes)
  validate(need(nrow(d) > 0, "Aucune géométrie disponible."))
  pal <- colorNumeric(palette = "YlOrRd", domain = dep_geo$hubs_per_100, na.color = "#f0f0f0")

  leaflet(d) |> addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
    addPolygons(
      fillColor = ~pal(hubs_per_100), weight = 1, color = "#4f5d75", opacity = 1, fillOpacity = 0.8,
      label = ~paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement, " | Hubs innovation /100 : ", round(hubs_per_100, 1)),
      popup = ~paste0("<b>", departement, "</b><br>Pôles innovation (nom + etalab): ", n_hubs)
    ) |> addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = dep_geo$hubs_per_100, title = "Hubs innovation /100")
})
```

### Déserts Sémantiques

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- dep_diversity_scatter
  df <- if (input$dep_select_axes == "Tous") df else mutate(df, profil = if_else(departement == input$dep_select_axes, "Sélection", profil))

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = n_etab_total, y = mots_uniques_par_etab, size = score_diversite_sem, color = profil, text = paste0(departement, " - ", libdepartement, "<br>Mots uniques / etab: ", round(mots_uniques_par_etab, 2)))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) + scale_color_manual(values = c("Profil standard" = "#6c757d", "Peu d'établissements / forte diversité" = couleur_secondaire, "Sélection" = couleur_accent)) +
    labs(x = "Nombre total d'établissements", y = "Mots-clés uniques par établissement", size = "Entropie sémantique", color = NULL) + theme_minimal()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
})
```
